What's On

Events & Programmes

Stay connected to what God is doing at All Nations Tabernacle. Every gathering is an opportunity for breakthrough.

📅 Sunday, 28th June 2026

Annual Thanksgiving Service

Our annual celebration of God's faithfulness. Come dressed in your best and bring a heart full of praise. All are welcome.

📅 9th June to 27th July 2026

7 Weeks Intensive Prayer for Nigeria

Morning 6:00 to 6:30AM daily. Afternoon Mon, Wed and Fri at 12:00 to 12:30PM. Join the national intercession.

📅 First Friday Every Month

Monthly Communion Service

A sacred time of reflection and renewal at the Lord's table. Every first Friday at 6:00 PM.

LFFAll Nations
Tabernacle
Who We Are

A Family Built on Faith and Purpose

Living Faith Foundation, All Nations Tabernacle is a vibrant, Spirit-filled assembly at Sarki Tafida Street, by 7th Day Adventist, Guzape, Asokoro District, Abuja. We are part of Living Faith Foundation, headquartered at Alheri Prayer Village, Km 31, Abuja-Kaduna Expressway, Kaduna.

Our mission: to reach every soul with the Gospel in the power of the Holy Ghost, disciple believers, and send them out to transform their world.

🙋

Spirit-Led Worship

Every Sunday, we encounter God through authentic, anointed praise and worship.

📚

Word-Based Teaching

Rooted in Scripture. Our Bible Studies and Sunday messages equip you for life.

❤

Community and Care

We are a family. From children to seniors, everyone belongs and everyone matters.

Our Leadership

Shepherding the Flock with Love and Vision

Pastor Samuel Olagoke
Resident / District Pastor

Pastor Samuel Olagoke shepherds the All Nations Tabernacle assembly with love, vision, and a passion for seeing every life transformed by the power of the Holy Ghost.

Rev. P.J.A. Olaiya
President, Living Faith Foundation

Rev. Olaiya leads the entire Living Faith Foundation movement. Headquarters at Alheri Prayer Village, Km 31, Abuja-Kaduna Expressway, Kaduna.
